entities.name: shot
entities.rationale: The ONLY way to pass validation with a blob: omit `store`. But the blob is still S3-semantic — `key` is documented as 'the S3 object key pattern', and render_review.ts buckets any blobs[] entry under the S3 panel ('offloaded to S3').

accessPatterns.source: repro: shot.ingest writes the PNG locally

blobs.key: annotate.<safeKey>.png  (a LOCAL sibling file — but the schema calls this an S3 object key)

immutability.why: re-shot overwrites the entry and its PNG
